caption:
Your ad spend is fine. The leak sits between the lead and the invoice, and most owners never measure it.

The Missed Revenue Calculator finds it. Enter four numbers you already know: monthly leads, close rate, average job value, and response speed.

It returns your revenue per lead, the monthly cost of slow follow-up, and what a 10% gain in response time, close rate, or repeat business is worth over a year.

Run your numbers before you spend another dollar on ads.

#LeadGeneration #ServiceBusiness #SmallBusinessGrowth #HomeServices #RevenueGrowth
rationale: Offers/Lead Magnets was the most under-served category this cycle, and this features an unclaimed tool (the Missed Revenue Calculator) that quantifies lead leakage without relying on an invented dollar valuation.
